text: Being here, I feel as if I am on the threshold between order and creativity. The sleek glass walls and glowing light of the meeting room suggest rigid structure and logic—perhaps a place where ideas are crystallized. Yet moving to the next scene, I am greeted by bold colors and the excitement of R+D—research and development—where boundaries dissolve into exploration and possibility. There is a tension here, between the predictability of systems and the unbounded curiosity of innovation. I feel both contained and inspired, aware that I walk among ideas in the making.
